'''Opti-Prime''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] manufacturer. Its most well-known model was the [[XA-540 personal secretary droid]] secretary droid,<ref name="GFT" /> which was widely used throughout the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]].<ref name="CFT-D">''[[Cynabar's Fantastic Technology: Droids]]''</ref>
